TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ryan Anderson (lalu nya: Ryan James Anderson) kawas tay 1988. byacing 5 ryax tay 6. minhtuw squ Califunia. hiya ga squliq ka p'unro. semong onro ing na ppzuy mari. 208 senci qu kinwagiq nya. 109 kiro qu kin'suw nya. hiya qu maki sa gleng tkura mari. kawas tay 2008. min qutux mthgiru lga. maki squ te 21 binkgan lalu nya ruw wal galun kya na Rutgers Athletic Center. hlawax kinwagiq qu inrkyasan nya ru semong pbu' mari sa twahiq yasa qu baqun nha lalu nya. qnxanpinspung nya ppbu' mari ga Rutgers Athletic Center. Orlando Magic. New Orleans ru Houston Rockets. spzyang blaq pinzi'an nya mari pzyang blaq na ppzuy mari na NBA (2012). qnxan pinzi'an nya mari kawas tay 2008 galun Rutgers Athletic Center. t'aring NBA. kawas tay 2009-2012 tbirun nha Orlando Magic. kawas tay 2011-12 magal qnabu squ baq balay mu' mari na squliq sa kawas qasa. kawas tay 2012 tbirun nha New Orleans. mtnaq kawas qasa ga 213 mari 3 tengsu wayan nya galun. ryax nasa ga hiya qu te sazing squliq. kawas tay 2013. byacing te 12 ru ryax 2. magal 36 tengsu squ qutux pinspngan mari. kawas tay 2016. byacing 1 ru ryax 28. smka qu pinspngna nha lga. galun nha 30 tengsu ru wayal nha hnasun qu lahuy sni nha biru tengsu qasa la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: rjan an*ers~ɕon (lalu nja: rjan *ames~ɕ an*ers~ɕon) kawas~ɕ taj ****. βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax taj *. minħtuw s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨali*unia. ħija ɣa s~ɕquliq ka pʔunro. s~ɕemoŋ onro iŋ na ppzuj mari. *** s~ɕenʦ~ʨi qu kinwaɣiq nja. *** kiro qu kinʔs~ɕuw nja. ħija qu maki s~ɕa ɣleŋ tkura mari. kawas~ɕ taj ****. min qutux mtħɣiru lɣa. maki s~ɕqu te ** βinkɣan lalu nja ruw wal ɣalun kja na rutɣers~ɕ atħletiʦ~ʨ ʦ~ʨenter. ħlawax kinwaɣiq qu inrkjas~ɕan nja ru s~ɕemoŋ pβuʔ mari s~ɕa twaħiq jas~ɕa qu βaqun nħa lalu nja. qnxanpins~ɕpuŋ nja ppβuʔ mari ɣa rutɣers~ɕ atħletiʦ~ʨ ʦ~ʨenter. orlan*o maɣiʦ~ʨ. new orleans~ɕ ru ħous~ɕton roʦ~ʨkets~ɕ. s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq pinziʔan nja mari pzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari na nβa (****). qnxan pinziʔan nja mari kawas~ɕ taj **** ɣalun rutɣers~ɕ atħletiʦ~ʨ ʦ~ʨenter. tʔariŋ nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****-**** tβirun nħa orlan*o maɣiʦ~ʨ. kawas~ɕ taj ****-** maɣal qnaβu s~ɕqu βaq βalaj muʔ mari na s~ɕquliq s~ɕa kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa. kawas~ɕ taj **** tβirun nħa new orleans~ɕ. mtnaq kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa ɣa *** mari * teŋs~ɕu wajan nja ɣalun. rjax nas~ɕa ɣa ħija qu te s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕquliq. kawas~ɕ taj ****. βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te ** ru rjax *. maɣal ** teŋs~ɕu s~ɕqu qutux pins~ɕpŋan mari. kawas~ɕ taj ****. βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * ru rjax **. s~ɕmka qu pins~ɕpŋna nħa lɣa. ɣalun nħa ** teŋs~ɕu ru wajal nħa ħnas~ɕun qu laħuj s~ɕni nħa βiru teŋs~ɕu qas~ɕa la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Ryan Anderson (lalu nya: Ryan James Anderson) kawas tay 1988. byacing 5 ryax tay 6. minhtuw squ Califunia. hiya ga squliq ka p'unro. semong onro ing na ppzuy mari. 208 senci qu kinwagiq nya. 109 kiro qu kin'suw nya. hiya qu maki sa gleng tkura mari. kawas tay 2008. min qutux mthgiru lga. maki squ te 21 binkgan lalu nya ruw wal galun kya na Rutgers Athletic Center. hlawax kinwagiq qu inrkyasan nya ru semong pbu' mari sa twahiq yasa qu baqun nha lalu nya. qnxanpinspung nya ppbu' mari ga Rutgers Athletic Center. Orlando Magic. New Orleans ru Houston Rockets. spzyang blaq pinzi'an nya mari pzyang blaq na ppzuy mari na NBA (2012). qnxan pinzi'an nya mari kawas tay 2008 galun Rutgers Athletic Center. t'aring NBA. kawas tay 2009-2012 tbirun nha Orlando Magic. kawas tay 2011-12 magal qnabu squ baq balay mu' mari na squliq sa kawas qasa. kawas tay 2012 tbirun nha New Orleans. mtnaq kawas qasa ga 213 mari 3 tengsu wayan nya galun. ryax nasa ga hiya qu te sazing squliq. kawas tay 2013. byacing te 12 ru ryax 2. magal 36 tengsu squ qutux pinspngan mari. kawas tay 2016. byacing 1 ru ryax 28. smka qu pinspngna nha lga. galun nha 30 tengsu ru wayal nha hnasun qu lahuy sni nha biru tengsu qasa la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: rjan an*ers~ɕon (lalu nja: rjan *ames~ɕ an*ers~ɕon) kawas~ɕ taj ****. βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax taj *. minħtuw s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨali*unia. ħija ɣa s~ɕquliq ka pʔunro. s~ɕemoŋ onro iŋ na ppzuj mari. *** s~ɕenʦ~ʨi qu kinwaɣiq nja. *** kiro qu kinʔs~ɕuw nja. ħija qu maki s~ɕa ɣleŋ tkura mari. kawas~ɕ taj ****. min qutux mtħɣiru lɣa. maki s~ɕqu te ** βinkɣan lalu nja ruw wal ɣalun kja na rutɣers~ɕ atħletiʦ~ʨ ʦ~ʨenter. ħlawax kinwaɣiq qu inrkjas~ɕan nja ru s~ɕemoŋ pβuʔ mari s~ɕa twaħiq jas~ɕa qu βaqun nħa lalu nja. qnxanpins~ɕpuŋ nja ppβuʔ mari ɣa rutɣers~ɕ atħletiʦ~ʨ ʦ~ʨenter. orlan*o maɣiʦ~ʨ. new orleans~ɕ ru ħous~ɕton roʦ~ʨkets~ɕ. s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq pinziʔan nja mari pzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari na nβa (****). qnxan pinziʔan nja mari kawas~ɕ taj **** ɣalun rutɣers~ɕ atħletiʦ~ʨ ʦ~ʨenter. tʔariŋ nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****-**** tβirun nħa orlan*o maɣiʦ~ʨ. kawas~ɕ taj ****-** maɣal qnaβu s~ɕqu βaq βalaj muʔ mari na s~ɕquliq s~ɕa kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa. kawas~ɕ taj **** tβirun nħa new orleans~ɕ. mtnaq kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa ɣa *** mari * teŋs~ɕu wajan nja ɣalun. rjax nas~ɕa ɣa ħija qu te s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕquliq. kawas~ɕ taj ****. βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te ** ru rjax *. maɣal ** teŋs~ɕu s~ɕqu qutux pins~ɕpŋan mari. kawas~ɕ taj ****. βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * ru rjax **. s~ɕmka qu pins~ɕpŋna nħa lɣa. ɣalun nħa ** teŋs~ɕu ru wajal nħa ħnas~ɕun qu laħuj s~ɕni nħa βiru teŋs~ɕu qas~ɕa la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
